title: Just-In GARDEN
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdf5a61aeecf12904c22b27c4dd48e490559992f.png)
Your world is now filled with various plants and a host of insects, which you can try to breed.

New tool : Sweep Net ,you can use it to catch the insectes
![net](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2aad10cf226f911d0068da640cb4cd9d01f8ec8.png)

Now has Butterfly ,Beetles and grasshopper, it will get more and more!

<details>
<summary>butterfly</summary>

![butterfly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b18af3ae34dda553318408ab9e51ba661fc0cc58.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>beetle</summary>

![beetle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1422105fbe17984e6f53a5515bcd32ef537daa72.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>grasshopper</summary>

![grasshopper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09402fc0393a8242ce4d2985f04bee93bf97f7c3.png)

</details>
